subject: tieng-anh
topic: Đề thi thử cuối học kỳ 2 — Tiếng Anh 6 (bấm giờ)

questions.question: What does 'recycle' mean? (Từ 'recycle' nghĩa là gì?)
What is the English word for 'bóng đá'? ('bóng đá' tiếng Anh là gì?)
Choose the comparative form of 'big'. (Dạng so sánh hơn của 'big')
Choose the correct verb: '___ tennis' (chơi tennis)
Complete: 'In the future, we ___ live on the moon.' (sẽ — điền 'will')
Match the word with its meaning (Nối từ với nghĩa)
Choose the superlative: 'The Nile is the ___ river in the world.' (dài nhất)
Choose the correct verb: '___ judo' (tập judo)

statements.text: We use 'will' to talk about the future.
Recycling is good for the environment.

questions.question: Complete with the comparative of 'small': 'A mouse is ___ than a cat.'
Which one is a TV programme? (Đâu là một chương trình ti vi?)
Choose the correct sentence (Chọn câu đúng)
options: My city is more crowded than your town.
My city crowded more your town.

questions.passage: In the future, our houses will be smart. Robots will help us with the housework. We will use solar energy to protect the environment.
questions.question: What will help us with the housework in the future? (Cái gì sẽ giúp ta làm việc nhà?)

questions.passage: In the future, our houses will be smart. Robots will help us with the housework. We will use solar energy to protect the environment.
questions.question: What energy will we use? (Ta sẽ dùng năng lượng gì?)

questions.passage: In the future, our houses will be smart. Robots will help us with the housework. We will use solar energy to protect the environment.
questions.question: Why will we use solar energy? (Vì sao ta dùng năng lượng mặt trời?)
Ask your friend about their favourite TV programme (Hỏi bạn về chương trình ti vi yêu thích)
options: What is your favourite TV programme?
